text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The talk is electric surrounding the runners
participating in today's race. King Halo, famous
recently for riling up the media, is no exception.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Moving to the waiting room of Yasuda Kinen,
King Halo proclaims it doesn't matter who she has
to face in today's race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She will break past any obstacle standing in her
way and kick away the competition. Her
enthusiasm is palpable in light of today's
challenge.
